context.role: End-game UI displaying final score and restart instructions
context.screen_position: Center of screen at x=300px (screen_width / 2), y=75px (screen_height / 2)
context.usage_scenario: Appears instantly when player collides with obstacle, displays GAME OVER message, final score, high score, and restart instruction. Waits for Space key input to restart game

size.height: 100px (total vertical span of all text elements)

visual_specification.shape: Multi-line centered text layout with 4 text elements vertically stacked
visual_specification.texture: Monospace pixel font, crisp pixel rendering

animation.description: No animation. Appears instantly on game over. Optional: restart instruction text blinks at 0.5 second intervals (2 FPS toggle between visible/invisible)

visual_specification.details: 4 text lines center-aligned: Line 1 (y=-30): 'GAME OVER' at 24px font size. Line 2 (y=0): 'Score: XXXXX' at 16px with 5-digit zero-padded score. Line 3 (y=20): 'HI XXXXX' at 16px with 5-digit high score. Line 4 (y=50): 'Press SPACE to restart' at 12px. All text in primary color #535353, no background overlay

relationships.shared_with: Same font style and color as score_display, same 5-digit zero-padding format for scores
relationships.differences_from: score_display is top-right positioned and live updating. gameover_screen is centered, static, and displays multiple text lines including high score and instructions

explicit_negations: No background overlay or dimming effect
No shadows or outlines on text
No buttons or clickable UI elements
